name: Letter of Intent (LOI).pdf
preview_text: LETTER OF INTENT — This non-binding letter of intent (LOI) sets forth the principal terms of the proposed acquisition of Downtown Office Tower by Acme Capital Partners from Global Properties Inc. for a purchase price of USD $150,000,000, subject to satisfactory due diligence and execution of a definitive Sales & Purchase Agreement.

name: KYC Documents.pdf
preview_text: KYC FILE — Identity verification, beneficial ownership disclosures, and proof-of-address records for the Buyer entity. All documents validated against government registries via integrated KYC providers. Status: APPROVED.

name: AML Compliance Declaration.pdf
preview_text: AML COMPLIANCE DECLARATION — Source of funds attestation and sanctions/PEP screening results for all transaction parties. Reviewed by compliance officer. Risk Rating: LOW.

name: Property Due Diligence Report.pdf
preview_text: DUE DILIGENCE REPORT — Comprehensive review of property condition, title, environmental status, and tenant rolls. No material findings. Recommended to proceed to contract.

name: Escrow Agreement.pdf
preview_text: ESCROW AGREEMENT — Tri-party agreement between Buyer, Seller, and SecureTrust Escrow Inc. governing the holding and release of $150,000,000 in earnest money and purchase funds, subject to specified release conditions.

name: Sales & Purchase Agreement (SPA).pdf
preview_text: SALES & PURCHASE AGREEMENT — Definitive contract setting forth the binding terms of sale, including representations, warranties, indemnities, conditions precedent, and closing mechanics for the Downtown Office Tower transaction.

name: Smart Contract Terms.pdf
preview_text: SMART CONTRACT TERMS — Codified release conditions deployed to the Vero blockchain. Funds will be auto-released upon programmatic verification of all conditions precedent. Contract address: 0xA1B2...F4E5.

name: Financial Proforma.xlsx
preview_text: FINANCIAL PROFORMA — 10-year cash flow projection including NOI, cap-rate analysis, IRR scenarios, and sensitivity tables for the Downtown Office Tower acquisition.

name: Title Commitment.pdf
preview_text: PRELIMINARY TITLE COMMITMENT — Issued by First American Title. No outstanding liens or encumbrances. Title insurance to be issued upon closing in the amount of the purchase price.
